text: Subah se dadi saas ne phir wahi UPSC ka taana dena shuru kiya aur kaha ki unki beti ne toh bina coaching ke bank nikal liya tha. Unki baatein sunte hi mere sir mein aisi ajeeb si chubhan aur bhari-pan hone laga hai ki mujhse ek line bhi nahi padhi ja rahi. Aisa lag raha hai jaise sir phat jayega aur pure badan mein itni thakan hai ki aankhein kholna mushkil ho raha hai.

Joint family mein privacy toh hai nahi, upar se dadi ne aaj phir sabke samne meri comparison bua se karke meri taiyari ko 'paisa barbaad' bola. Us argument ke baad se mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan aur cramps ho rahe hain, lagta hai jaise kuch hazam hi nahi ho raha. Kal raat se haath-pair thande pad gaye hain aur bilkul jaan nahi bachi sharir mein, bas sote rehne ka mann karta hai.

Dadi saas har waqt mujhe neecha dikhati hain ki unki beti ne rishta bhi sambhala aur naukri bhi, aur main sirf 'dropper' bankar baithi hoon. Jab bhi wo ye bolti hain, mera gala ghutne lagta hai aur seene mein itni jalan hoti hai jaise koi aag lagi ho. Aaj subah se itna chakkar aa raha hai aur aankhon ke aage andhera hai ki lagta hai abhi gir jaungi.

Aaj phir saas-bahu dynamics ki tension mein dadi ne meri comparison bua se ki, jiske baad se meri pith aur kandhon mein itna bhayanak dard hai ki main seedhi baith bhi nahi pa rahi. Pura sharir jaise jakad gaya hai aur ajeeb si bechaini ho rahi hai jaise koi bhari bojh rakha ho mujh par. Itni kamzori mehsus ho rahi hai ki thoda sa bolne par bhi saans phoolne lagti hai.

Jab bhi dadi meri coaching investment ko lekar izzat ka waasta deti hain aur apni beti ki tareef karti hain, mere kaano mein seetiyaan bajne lagti hain. Aaj subah se pura badan toot raha hai aur aisa lag raha hai jaise bukhar chadhne wala hai, bilkul himmat nahi hai library jane ki. Ye privacy loss aur roz ka kalesh ab mere sharir se bardaasht nahi ho raha, lagta hai haddiyan dukh rahi hain.
